description: Create and deploy a NextGen Connect channel named 'DICOM_Migration' to migrate DICOM medical image files from /home/ga/dicom_input/ to /home/ga/dicom_output/. The channel must treat files as binary data to preserve image integrity. Rename output files to include a '_migrated' suffix before the extension (e.g., 'CT_small.dcm' becomes 'CT_small_migrated.dcm'). Access the system via the terminal or the Web Dashboard at https://localhost:8443 (admin/admin). A sample DICOM file 'CT_small.dcm' is provided in the input directory. Note that File Writer destinations write to the container's filesystem.
